'''Osted Wermis''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] and the [[Commander/Legends|commandant]] of [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|capture of Coruscant]], he held the [[Axum system]] even as the Republic gained control of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], however, his superior, Admiral [[Feyet Kiez]], absconded from the system with the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Whelm]]'', having been ordered by the Reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to join his forces assembling at [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] for a [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|new strike]] against the New Republic. With the linchpin of his defenses gone, Wermis surrendered Anaxes to the Republic shortly afterwards, admitting to his captors that he was as baffled as [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] as to the ''Whelm''{{'s}} destination.
